name: awesome-multimodal-intelligence
description: 专注于 VLM、VLA、世界模型及通用具身智能等方向，收录前沿论文、开源代码与数据集，追踪从感知到决策的下一代智能体技术。  A curated collection for multimodal intelligence research, covering VLMs, VLAs, World Models, and embodied AI — tracking next-generation agent technologies from perception to decision-making, with a focus on papers, code, and datasets.
